name: gigafy_portal
title: Gigafy Management Portal
description: Read-only access to manage.gigafy.com.au via the Hotspot Login Services API. Sales orders, quotes, BOM lookups. Single shared service-account auth (transitional — Cameron's per-user OAuth + delegation will replace this).

credentials.label: Service account username
credentials.description: Username of the dedicated service account that AgentHQ uses to query the Portal.

credentials.label: Service account password
credentials.description: Encrypted at rest in the systemd-creds vault. Never visible to the LLM or to the agent user — only the trusted -mcp peer can decrypt it. Rotate via `sudo agenthq-cred set portal_api_pass`.

credentials.label: Reseller GUID
credentials.description: Gigafy's reseller GUID — used as a path segment in the Sales Orders search endpoint.

credentials.label: API URL
credentials.description: Defaults to https://au.api.hotspotlogin.services. Override only if you're pointing at a staging environment.

gigafy_portal_ping.description: Connectivity sanity check — mints a fresh access token and reports who we authenticated as
